content.question:
📚 IDIOMS REFERENCE
all butnearly, almost
all inexhausted
all toldaltogether
for allin spite of
of all peopleexpress annoyance
all alongfrom the beginning
all the sameyet, however
all in allwhen considered
for all I knowas far as I know
for all I careI don't care
take into accountto consider sth
on account ofbecause of
on no accountno circumstances
on this/that accountfor this reason
on the airbroadcasting
in the airuncertain / spreading
clear the airget rid of suspicion
up in armsvery angry
on the alerton the look-out
Fill in the blanks with one of the idioms.

1. I've ___ finished; just give me a few minutes.
content.answer: all but || all but

content.question: 2. He's promised to come to the party on Friday; ___, I don't believe him.
content.answer: all the same || all the same

content.question: 3. ___ his hard work he didn't get a promotion.
content.answer: For all || For all

content.question: 4. I don't know how they found out, but they've known about it ___ .
content.answer: all along || all along

content.question: 5. I've been reading the newspapers and ___ . I think the government will win the election.
content.answer: all in all || all in all

content.question: 6. She told me her name was Joan but ___ she could be lying.
content.answer: for all I know || for all I know

content.question: 7. I don't think I'll go out tonight. I'm ___ .
content.answer: all in || all in

content.question: 8. I never expected you, ___, to say such a thing!
content.answer: of all people || of all people

content.question: 9. Of course you can't live with us! ___ you can live in the street!
content.answer: For all I care || For all I care

content.question: 10. ___, there were 50 people at the party, but not everyone stayed the whole evening.
content.answer: All told || All told

content.question: 11. Instead of bottling up your feelings, let's have a good talk and ___ .
content.answer: clear the air || clear the air

content.question: 12. There's talk ___ of a possible stock-market crash.
content.answer: in the air || in the air

content.question: 13. The villagers are ___ about the proposed motorway.
content.answer: up in arms || up in arms

content.question: 14. I haven't been able to travel much lately ___ my car having broken down.
content.answer: on account of || on account of

content.question: 15. His future is still up ___ ; he can't decide whether to become a surgeon or a psychiatrist.
content.answer: in the air || in the air

content.question: 16. You must ___ his educational background when deciding what work to give him.
content.answer: take into account || take into account

content.question: 17. The meeting tomorrow is very important; ___ must you be late.
content.answer: on no account || on no account

content.question: 18. There's been a storm in Manila, so ___ we won't be going there on holiday.
content.answer: on this account || on this account

content.question: 19. You can't go into the studio just yet as the programme is still ___ .
content.answer: on the air || on the air

content.question: 20. The police are always ___ for terrorists, particularly at airports.
content.answer: on the alert || on the alert
